calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing For Approval For Verified Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights Pursuant To California Insurance Code 10134 Et Seq.
Off Calendar Nov-19-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. JUAN C. LOZANO, Esq. of the Law Office of Juan C. Lozano (Tel: 619-647-9129) for petitioner Asset Security Consiulting, LLC;
ARIANNA MORAS as the Payee.

HEARING RE: PETITIONER ASSET SECURITY CONSULTING, LLC's Verified Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights Pursuant To California Insurance Code 10134 Et Seq.

The Court inquires of the Payee as to her understanding of the transfer. Matter submitted.

The Court rules as follows: Petition is granted.

Counsel for petitioner is required to prepare and submit a proposed order.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

Notice Of Hearing For Approval For Verified Petition Ofr Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights Pursuant To California Insurancce Code 10134 Et Seq.
Off Calendar Oct-15-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PETITIONER ASSET SECURITY CONSULTING, LLC's Hearing For Approval For Verified Petition Of Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights Pursuant To California Insurance Code 10134 Et Seq.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Ordered off calendar for noncompliance with Local Rule 2.7(B) (courtesy copies). Petition may be re-set for a Mon.-Thur. after November 1. Papers shall bear new hearing date.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
